title: OUTPATIENT ADDICTION SERVICES - 211info
text: NARA NW OUTPATIENT TREATMENT CENTER OUTPATIENT ADDICTION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental assessments and evaluation, substance abuce counseling, parenting groups, gambling addiction treatment, DUI rehiabiliation programs, and traditional ceremonies. 1631 SW Columbia Street Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Age 18 and older. Provides culturally appropriate services for the Native American community. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 307-7775 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 307-7775 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Fees vary based on individual care plans. Accepts Medicaid, Medicare, VA, Blue Cross, Indian Health Services, and Tribal Funds. Financial assistance may be available. DOCUMENTS: Must have a current alcohol and drug assessment, physical exam, and tuberculosis test prior to being reviewed and approved by the admissions committee AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the Goose Hollow area Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Cultural Heritage Programs * Native American Community DUI Offender Programs Gambling Disorder Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Parent Support Groups Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NARA NW OUTPATIENT TREATMENT CENTER
